autowork.configuration.newRedstoneDetect: New redstone detection. May be better than older, may be buggier than older
autowork.configuration.holderDecorRender: Render decorations of item when looking at holder
item.autowork.dye_cartridge.insert_dye: Click with dye on the cartridge to insert it
enchantment.autowork.crushing.desc: Crushes certain blocks when mined, enabling different drops.
itemhelp.autowork.wrench: Sometimes machines freeze (mostly because of crashes). Use wrench to make them tick again.
itemhelp.autowork.template_card: Template card is required for templater. Shift + Right-click on container to make a template of its inventory (direction is taken into account). Then you can use it in templater
blockhelp.autowork.templater.details: Tries to put items by given template (in exactly same slots). Will not do anything if there's not enough items. Requires template card.
blockhelp.autowork.sculk_cell.details: Stores experience. Right-click to deposit your experience and shift + right-click to take experience.
blockhelp.autowork.controlled_catalyst.d: Collects and puts experience orbs into Sculk Cell below when powered
blockhelp.autowork.repair_station.detail: Tries to repair tool when powered. If the tool has mending enchantment it'll only use experience, if not - it'll require both experience and repair material. Tries to put repaired tool in storage in front of itself, if fails - drops it
blockhelp.autowork.amethyst_bulb.details: Emits signal impulse when redstone signal disappears on all the sides
blockhelp.autowork.quartz_bulb.details: Emits signal impulse when redstone signal appears on at least one side
blockhelp.autowork.modular_carrier.detai: Moves block in front of itself along when rotated. Also rotates other Modular Carriers above or below itself
blockhelp.autowork.carrier.details: Moves block in front of itself along when powered and rotated
blockhelp.autowork.rotator.details: Rotates block in front of itself. Angle is configurable by right-clicking: 90, 180 or 270
blockhelp.autowork.redstone_coil.details: Emits concrete power of signal, configurable by right-clicking
blockhelp.autowork.redstone_hub.details: All outputs emit redstone signal when any of input side has redstone signal. Node's mode can be changed by right-clicking
blockhelp.autowork.holder.details: Holds item in itself. If item can contain fluid, energy or other items, it'll 'proxy' its capabilities through the block (works best with other mods; probably)
blockhelp.autowork.enricher.details: Enriches ore in front of itself when has fuel. Enriched ore drops a little bit more of resources than normal one
blockhelp.autowork.painter.details: Tries to dye the block in front of it using given dye
blockhelp.warn.critical: ⚠ WIP! Might cause crashes. Report critical issues on Github.
blockhelp.autowork.breeze_collector.deta: When powered, sucks in all items in front of it and puts them in storage behind
blockhelp.autowork.buffer.details: Can hold 9 stacks. Right-click with item in your hand to put it in buffer or right-click without item to get last stack of buffer
blockhelp.autowork.buffered_breeze_colle: When powered, sucks in all items in front of it and puts them in internal storage
blockhelp.autowork.cartloader.top: Storage of minecarts with chest required
blockhelp.autowork.cartloader.details: Spawns a minecart if both storages are provided; then puts contents of the storage behind into minecart
blockhelp.autowork.cartrefiller.details: Puts items into already existing minecart with chest in front of it
blockhelp.autowork.buffered_cartloader.d: Spawns a minecart if both storages are provided; then puts contents of its storage into minecart
blockhelp.autowork.buffered_cartunloader: When minecart passes by, Cart Unloader will unload it: all its contents would be transferred to the internal storage
blockhelp.autowork.railway.details: Detects minecart, can filter them by name if sign is placed
blockhelp.autowork.toggler.details: Works like copper bulb but has one side with output; it emits signal when bulb is lit
blockhelp.autowork.cartunloader.details: When minecart passes by and both storages are provided, Cart Unloader will unload it: all its contents would be transferred to the storage behind, and the minecart itself would appear in the storage above
blockhelp.autowork.distributor.master.fr: When 'Master': scans the nodes in front of it
blockhelp.autowork.distributor.node.fron: When 'Node': points at the target storage
blockhelp.autowork.distributor.addition: All 'Nodes' should face the same direction (and storages) and 'Master' should face them
blockhelp.autowork.distributor.details: Evenly distributes items between storages using nodes
blockhelp.autowork.drill.details: Destroys the block using given tool; all drops are collected in the internal storage
blockhelp.autowork.drill.addition: Right-click to put/extract item from drill
blockhelp.autowork.extractor.details: Transfers items from the storage in back to the storage in front
blockhelp.autowork.pump.details: When has fuel and liquid below itself, starts pulling the fluid to it and then tries to put it into fluid storage above. When pump finishes it's work it emits redstone signal.
blockhelp.autowork.sculk_mover.details: Moves blocks in front of itself closer when powered with redstone, including some that are not movable by pistons
blockhelp.autowork.fluid_extractor.detai: Replaces block in front of itself with fluid behind. If there is a storage in front of it, it'll put the fluid in it. If there is a storage behind AND in front of it, it'll transfer 1000mb of fluid
blockhelp.autowork.smelter.details: Tries to convert one block into another using lava
blockhelp.autowork.spiller.details: Places fluid from storage in front of itself if there is space. If not, it'll try to convert block in front of itself using fluid
blockhelp.autowork.precise_observer.deta: Configurable observer; will emit signal only when specific block is in front of it
blockhelp.autowork.fluid_barrel.details: Fluids can be inserted/extracted manually when fluid is opened. Drops itself with fluid contents when broken
blockhelp.autowork.filterchute.addition1: Right-click with item to change filter
blockhelp.autowork.placer.details: Places blocks from its storage in front of itself
blockhelp.autowork.ticker.details: Rename clock to format: XmYsZt and then right-click the Ticker with it to set its timer
blockhelp.autowork.transmitter.back: When powered: shoots signal entity from front
blockhelp.autowork.transmitter.details: Used in cases when you need to transfer redstone signal by air
blockhelp.autowork.andgate.details: Emits signal only when both sides are powered
autowork.ponder.canner.text_2: Place an empty can under it, then put some food in it as well
autowork.ponder.canner.text_3: Then, power it with redstone signal
autowork.ponder.canner.text_4: Congratulations! You canned your first can
autowork.ponder.saw.text_2: Place a saw in front of tree, put some fuel in it
autowork.ponder.saw.text_3: Then, power it by constant redstone signal
autowork.ponder.saw.text_4: It'll begin to destroy the tree
